race.comment: ALADDIN'S GIRL (8) good type who can shed her Maiden tag quickly this prep. Not that far away in the three career runs last October and fitted with the two searching 1050m trials. Ready to go from the good gate with J Mac up. EYNESBURY (4) another from the Waller yard due for a change of luck fifth-up. Closed late in the soft (7) going with a narrow second over 1400m at Warwick Farm. Wide draw is the only negative. IN A TIZZY (10) improved showing at her second race start when held a forward position to secure third over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Has further upside and not to be overlooked. LAWLESS LUCY (12) launched late on debut with a respectable third over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Claim helps and ready for the 1400m. Respect.
race.rail_position: 8m from 1000m to Winning post and 6m the remainder. (Pent: 5.55)
